author: qJ2u
content:
## Systematic Debugging + VSDD/VDD Review (CI Run 24916189071)

### Phase 1: Root Cause — CONFIRMED

The handover correctly identifies the root cause. Confirmed via CI logs:

```
usr/local/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/picomatch/package.json → 4.0.3 (vulnerable)
```

App deps clean (0 vulns). npm's bundled picomatch is the sole source.

### Phase 2: Pattern Analysis — Layered Verification Debt

The 5-commit chain (aa3593d → af8c42b) exhibits a classic pattern: each fix resolves the immediate symptom but reveals the next pre-existing vulnerability layer. This is VDD working correctly — new verification gates expose accumulated tech debt that was invisible before.

| Layer | Symptom | Root Cause | Fix |
|-------|---------|-----------|-----|
| 1 | OpenSSL CVEs in dev | trixie overlay only on prod Dockerfile | Add trixie-security to dev Dockerfile |
| 2 | 28 CVEs in frontend prod | node:20-slim (Bookworm) vs Trixie | node:22-trixie-slim |
| 3 | oxfmt failure | manual package.json edit not formatted | bun run fmt before commit |
| 4 | picomatch CVE-2026-33671 | npm bundled deps in runner stage | strip npm/yarn/corepack |

### VSDD: Structural Verification

Coupling boundary problem. The runner stage in Dockerfile.prod has unnecessary coupling to the base image tooling surface. The fix (strip package managers) reduces coupling to the minimum: node binary + compiled build artifacts.

Current Dockerfile.prod is missing the strip step. Lines 29-30 should be:
```dockerfile
RUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs &&     adduser --system --uid 1001 sveltekit &&     rm -rf /usr/local/lib/node_modules/npm /opt/yarn-* /usr/local/lib/node_modules/corepack
```

### VDD: Verification Gaps Identified

1. No local Trivy scan step — CI-only verification. Should add a justfile recipe for local Trivy scanning before push.
2. No pre-commit format check — oxfmt failures should be caught locally, not in CI.
3. No Dockerfile linter — hadolint would catch base image mismatches across stages.
4. Missing verification gate: runner stage minimal — no check ensuring runner stages dont carry package managers.

### Systematic Debugging: Avoiding Same Failures

Rule 1: Read Trivy paths. /usr/local/lib/node_modules/npm/... = base image tooling. Dont waste time on app dep overrides.

Rule 2: Fix the structural problem. Stripping npm fixes the entire class of npm-bundled-dep CVEs forever. Upgrading individual packages is whack-a-mole.

Rule 3: Run formatters before commit. bun run fmt is non-negotiable for any frontend file change.

Rule 4: Consistent base image generation. All stages in all Dockerfiles should use the same Debian version.

### Knowledge Pages Created

- production-docker-strip-package-managers — reusable pattern
- layered-ci-failures-verification-debt — this analysis
